onboarding_step10_description.message: Explore more features in the app.

onboarding_step11_description.message: Explore more features in the app.

Did you know that
AppBlock is also available
as a mobile app?

onboarding_step11_yes_dont_use.message: Yes, but I do not use it

onboarding_step12_content.message: Try blocking mobile apps and websites on your phone today!

onboarding_step12_header_title.message:
AppBlock is used by millions of
people around the world.

onboarding_step1_header_title.message:
Block distracting
websites and keywords
with AppBlock

onboarding_step2_header_title.message: What can AppBlock help you with?

onboarding_step3_header_title.message: What can AppBlock help you with?

onboarding_step4_header_title.message:
You know…
You're really not alone.

onboarding_step4_text_1.message: Countless studies show that many people struggle to concentrate due to modern lifestyle's pressure and phone reliance, with distracting apps competing for attention.

onboarding_step4_text_2.message: According to the World Health Organization (WHO), mental health issues affect approximately 1 in 4 people worldwide.

onboarding_step4_text_3.message: According to the latest data, the average user checks their phone every 12 minutes, about 80 times a day. 68% of people use their phone while eating with friends or family.

onboarding_step4_text_4.message: According to the latest data, 28,000 people are watching porn at any given time, and 84% of all viewing is on a phone!

onboarding_step4_text_5.message: Game addiction is a growing problem worldwide. It is classified as a mental disorder by the WHO and affects 3-4% of gamers. That is approx. 60 million people.

onboarding_step4_text_6.message: Using a phone before bedtime can disrupt sleep by reducing melatonin production, leading to poor sleep quality. This affects many people's ability to sleep well.

onboarding_step5_content.message: We'll help you by blocking distractions so you can focus on what matters to you the most.

onboarding_step6_header_title.message: What do users say about AppBlock?

onboarding_step6_text_1.message: “I love it- it’s simple and great for my ADHD!”

onboarding_step6_text_2.message: By this app, I block the app that is so distracting me for my study and by this app, I save so much time for my study for my better future

onboarding_step6_text_3.message: This has been an extremely useful app for me. Works very well in terms of how it claims to work.

onboarding_step7_quick_block_description.message: Keep things simple and just turn blocking on/off?

onboarding_step7_scheduled_block_descrip.message: Create automated blocking based on your needs, schedule, and more.

onboarding_step7_strict_mode_description.message: If you're having trouble following the rules you've set up in AppBlock, you can use Strict Mode for stricter rules.

onboarding_step8_description.message: Add websites that will be blocked when Quick Block is active. Don’t worry, you can turn off blocking at any time. We just want to show you how it all works.

onboarding_step8_header_title.message: Let's try the first blocking together

onboarding_step9_description.message: Press the Start button and go and see if the websites you've selected are really blocked.
